zh.lifeSummary: John Hawes是Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish的兒子，於1469年出生在英國素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯。他於1495年與Katherine Holmes在英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1527年1月19日在英國素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Hawes是Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish的儿子，于1469年出生在英国素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯。他于1495年与Katherine Holmes在英国英格兰素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1527年1月19日在英国素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hawes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: of Norman origin, from Anglo-Norman French and Middle English Haueis, Hawis, from an Old French form of the ancient Germanic female personal name Hadewidis (from had- ‘war’ + wid- with a range of possible original meanings).
variant of Haw , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Haw
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Haw(e) which, like Daw(e), was probably a rhyming pet form of Middle English Raw (Ralph). Similar rhyming pet forms of other Anglo-Norman male personal names beginning with R- are found in Hick and Dick for Rick (Richard) and Hob and Dob for Rob(ert). See also Hawkin .
English: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from Middle English hawe ‘enclosure’ (Old English haga or Old Norse hagi). Compare Haugh .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 何 and 賀, see   He   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John Hawes was born in 1469, in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England as the son of Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish. He married Katherine Holmes in 1495, in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 19 January 1527, in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, at the age of 58.

ko.lifeSummary: John Hawes(은)는 1469년 영국 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에서 Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에서 Katherine Holmes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1527년 1월 19일 영국 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: John Hawes родился в 1469 г. в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия. Его мать звали Lady Edith Latymer of Duntish. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Holmes в 1495 г. в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 19 января 1527 г. в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.
